steps.title: Identify the crucial word in the claim
steps.content: The word temporary is central—the quotation must show the escape ending or its dreamlike unreality, not just depict attendance at the play.

steps.title: Match the temporary quality
steps.content: A captures this with “like a dream ended,” illustrating both the escapist nature and the moment of return to reality. The other three describe the theatre setting, her entry, or a different scene, without showing the transient experience. That matches Choice A — "The play was over, the music ceased, the crowd filed out. It was like a dream ended.".
